evals.prompt: I'm building a vehicle management platform for fleet operators. We need user stories for a new feature: remote vehicle diagnostics. Fleet managers should be able to check engine health, tire pressure, and battery status remotely from a dashboard. We also need alerts when something is critical. Can you write user stories for this?
evals.expected_output: Multiple user stories in As-a/I-want/So-that format with Given/When/Then acceptance criteria, INVEST validation table, and sizing hints. Should identify fleet manager as primary persona and potentially driver/technician as secondary. Stories should be split appropriately (not one giant story for all diagnostics).
expectations: Stories use 'As a / I want to / So that' format
Each story has acceptance criteria in Given/When/Then format
Each story has an INVEST validation check
Each story has a sizing hint
Stories are split into independent units (not one monolith)
At least one story covers the alert/notification flow
Personas are identified (fleet manager at minimum)
Clarifying questions were asked before generating

evals.prompt:
Here are some user stories my team wrote. Can you review and improve them?

1. As a user, I want to log in so that I can log in.
2. As a user, I want to search for products and filter them and sort them and save favorites so that I can find stuff.
3. As an admin, I want to manage everything.
evals.expected_output: Identifies specific problems with each story: #1 has a tautological 'so that', #2 combines too many features (violates Independent/Small), #3 is too vague. Rewrites each with proper format, acceptance criteria, INVEST validation. Splits #2 into multiple stories.
expectations: Identifies that story #1's 'so that' restates the 'I want'
Identifies that story #2 violates Independent and Small (combines multiple features)
Identifies that story #3 is too vague to be actionable
Provides rewritten versions with proper acceptance criteria
Splits story #2 into at least 2 separate stories
All rewritten stories include INVEST validation

evals.prompt: We're adding a password reset feature to our mobile banking app. Target users are retail banking customers aged 25-65. The app runs on iOS and Android. Security is critical — we need to comply with banking regulations. Write me user stories for this.
evals.expected_output: User stories covering the password reset flow with security-aware acceptance criteria. Should cover happy path, error paths (wrong email, expired link, etc.), and possibly MFA/verification steps given the banking security context. Should ask about specific security requirements before generating.
expectations: Stories use proper As-a/I-want/So-that format
Acceptance criteria cover security concerns (link expiry, attempt limits, etc.)
At least one story covers the error/unhappy path
Stories acknowledge the banking regulation constraint
Each story has INVEST validation and sizing
Stories are appropriately scoped (not one giant 'reset password' story)
